race.comment: TAPINFORPAR (7) has returned in terrific order this campaign and ready to add another win to the tally after scorching home here two weeks ago behind STREETCAR APOLLO. Gets the weight swing and if Murtagh can utilise the draw this time, they won't stop him. STREETCAR APOLLO (4) is a proven winner that keeps raising the bar. Concedes weight to a few his main dangers but still has more to offer fourth-up and is drawn to advantage. Sure to be very competitive again. PLACO (6) was in a handy spot fresh but lacked a turn of foot to capitalise. Better for that and id unbeaten on the Parks surface from two attempts. Worth another chance. ZEBELLA (8) comes through the STREETCAR APOLLO race and gets 3kgs off from another favourable draw. Can give this a shake.
